stemHtml: Under operational procedures, when is a pilot considered to be acclimatised?

options.a: When the pilot is settled in a location different from their home time zone
options.b: When the pilot has been in a specific climate for several days
options.c: When the pilot has been in the same location for a specified amount of time (e.g., 72 hours)
options.d: When the pilot is provided rest facilities that meet regulatory requirements
